name: token-monitor
author: lsys.cc
description: Code Plan (Token Plan) 套餐余量桌面小工具

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='public';const dest='dist';fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>{const s=path.join(src,f);const d=path.join(dest,f);if(fs.statSync(s).isDirectory()){fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true})}else{fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}});"
